description: Create a fully-constrained 15-sided 2D closed profile of a machining V-block in SolveSpace. The profile must be a single closed polygon without boolean groups. Requirements include: overall width of 60.0 mm, height of 40.0 mm, and a centered V-notch on the top face with a 30.0 mm opening width and a 90° internal angle. Include rectangular clamping slots on both sides, each 5.0 mm deep and 10.0 mm high, with their bottom edges 15.0 mm from the base. The profile must be symmetrical and fully constrained (0 degrees of freedom). Save the design to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/v_block_profile.slvs.
